noAISourceFeedback.en-UK: This character does not have an AI source. Please [set the AI source](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage) first.
noAISourceFeedback.zh-CN: 抱歉，该角色尚未配置AI源，暂时无法进行对话。请在[设置中配置AI源](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage)。
noAISourceFeedback.ar-SA: عذرًا، لم يتم تكوين مصدر الذكاء الاصطناعي لهذه الشخصية، لذا فإن الحوار غير متاح مؤقتًا. يرجى تكوين مصدر الذكاء الاصطناعي في [الإعدادات](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage).
noAISourceFeedback.de-DE: Dieser Charakter hat keine KI-Quelle. Bitte [konfigurieren Sie eine KI-Quelle in den Einstellungen](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage) zuerst.
noAISourceFeedback.es-ES: Este personaje no tiene una fuente de IA. Por favor, [configura una fuente de IA en los ajustes](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage) primero.
noAISourceFeedback.fr-FR: Ce personnage n'a pas de source d'IA. Veuillez [configurer une source d'IA dans les paramètres](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage) d'abord.
noAISourceFeedback.hi-IN: इस चरित्र में AI स्रोत नहीं है। कृपया पहले [सेटिंग्स में AI स्रोत सेट करें](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage)।
noAISourceFeedback.is-IS: Því miður hefur gervigreind uppspretta ekki verið stillt fyrir þennan karakter, þannig að samræður eru ekki tiltækar tímabundið. Vinsamlega stilltu gervigreindargjafann í [Stillingar](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage).
noAISourceFeedback.it-IT: Questo personaggio non ha una fonte AI. Per favore, [configura una fonte AI nelle impostazioni](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage) prima.
noAISourceFeedback.ja-JP: このキャラクターにはAIソースが設定されていません。[設定でAIソースを設定してください](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage)。
noAISourceFeedback.ko-KR: 이 캐릭터에는 AI 소스가 구성되어 있지 않습니다. [설정에서 AI 소스를 구성해 주세요](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage).
noAISourceFeedback.lzh: 此化身智源未設，暫難對談。[請於規度中置之](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage)。
noAISourceFeedback.nl-NL: Sorry, de AI-bron is niet geconfigureerd voor dit personage, dus dialoog is tijdelijk niet beschikbaar. Configureer de AI-bron in [Instellingen](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage).
noAISourceFeedback.pt-PT: Este personagem não tem uma fonte de IA. Por favor, [configure uma fonte de IA nas definições](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage) primeiro.
noAISourceFeedback.ru-RU: У этого персонажа нет источника ИИ. Пожалуйста, [настройте источник ИИ в настройках](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage) сначала.
noAISourceFeedback.uk-UA: Вибачте, джерело ШІ не налаштовано для цього персонажа, тому діалог тимчасово недоступний. Будь ласка, налаштуйте джерело ШІ в [Налаштуваннях](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage).
noAISourceFeedback.vi-VN: Nhân vật này chưa có nguồn AI. Vui lòng [cấu hình nguồn AI trong cài đặt](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage) trước.
noAISourceFeedback.zh-TW: 抱歉，該角色尚未配置AI來源，暫時無法進行對話。請在[設定中設定AI來源](https://steve02081504.github.io/fount/protocol?url=fount://page/parts/shells:serviceSourceManage)。
